name: Cherry-Topped Icebox Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg 6 serv. size Jello instant vanilla pudding
2 cans 21 oz ea. cherry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9-inch pan with some of the graham crackers, breaking them if necessary.
2. Pour cold milk into a bowl.
3. Add pudding mix to the milk and beat until well blended for 1 to 2 minutes at low speed.
4. Let stand for 5 minutes; then blend in Cool Whip®.
5. Spread half of the pudding mixture over the crackers.
6. Add another layer of crackers.
7. Top with the remaining pudding mixture and crackers.
8. Spread cherry pie filling over the top.
9. Chill about 3 hours.
